title: Doll Room
description:
You enter a hidden room...

It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from [green]joy[/green] to [purple]sorrow[/purple], their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.

A [sine][blue]chorus of whispers[/blue][/sine] grows louder and louder until [jitter][red]the dolls are shouting[/red][/jitter] over each other and calling for you...

You must choose one and leave immediately.

options.title: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice

notes: This event presents three ways to choose a Doll Relic: instantly, with minimal deliberation, or with careful examination. There are exactly three Doll Relics in this event's pool: [gold]Daughter of the Wind[/gold], [gold]Mr. Struggles[/gold], and [gold]Bing Bong[/gold]. The [gold]Pick at Random[/gold] option immediately grants one without any choice. The [gold]Take Some Time[/gold] option costs 5 unblockable HP and lets you choose from 2 of the 3 relics (randomly shuffled). The [gold]Examine Each and Make the Best Choice[/gold] option costs 15 unblockable HP and lets you choose from all 3 relics. Each relic choice shows a unique flavor description before being added to your relic pool.
